channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gambling Ads and Their Impact on Youth in Sports Culture
item.description: The article discusses how gambling advertisements during football matches, especially during events like the FIFA World Cup, are influencing children and young adults in Nigeria. It highlights the ris...

item.title: UN Report Accuses Sudan’s RSF of Genocide in Darfur City Siege
item.description: A United Nations investigation has concluded that the Sudanese Rapid Support Forces (RSF) committed acts amounting to genocide during their siege and capture of al-Fashir, a city in north Darfur. The ...

item.title: Another Teen Charged in Sault Boardwalk Assault Case
item.description: A new teenager has been charged in the ongoing assault investigation at the Sault Ste. Marie boardwalk, adding to the growing list of suspects in a case that has drawn significant attention. The incid...

item.title: U.S. troop deployment in Europe tied to Greenland negotiations and Iran tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that decisions regarding U.S. military presence in Europe will depend on how NATO allies address his concerns about Greenland and the ongoing conflict with Iran. Durin...

item.title: Authorities and Investors Converting Public Spaces into Private Uses
item.description: The article highlights growing concerns across Tanzania about the privatization of public open spaces. Officials and investors are increasingly converting areas designated for communal use into commer...

item.title: Met Police probe foreign donation to Conservative leadership campaign
item.description: The Metropolitan Police is investigating a donation of £37,500 received by Robert Jenrick's Conservative leadership campaign in 2024, following claims that the funds originated overseas. The Electoral...

item.title: WHO Advocates for People-Centered Cancer Control Amid Rising Global Cases
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has issued a comprehensive report highlighting the urgent need for a people-centered approach to cancer control as global cancer cases are projected to nearly doubl...

item.title: Family Struggles With Nonbinary Child's Identity and Estranged In-Laws
item.description: A letter writer shares a complex family situation involving their 24-year-old nonbinary child, Avery, who has faced rejection from the writer's husband's parents, particularly the father-in-law. The f...

item.title: The impact of Telstra's outage on Australian businesses and consumers
item.description: The Telstra outage, which disrupted services across Australia for several hours in July 2026, has sparked widespread concern about the reliability of critical infrastructure. This incident highlights ...

item.title: Death Sentence for 2019 Murder of TV Anchor Mureed Abbas in Karachi
item.description: A sessions court in Karachi has sentenced a man to death for his role in the 2019 murder of TV anchor Mureed Abbas and his friend Khizer Hayat. The incident occurred in the Khayaban-i-Bukhari area on ...

item.title: Nigeria's Renaissance Energy targets revival of dormant offshore oil field
item.description: Renaissance Africa Energy has initiated plans to develop the JK field in Nigeria's Niger Delta, a former Shell offshore asset that was left unused for nearly six decades after significant oil discover...

item.title: Proposed Regulations to Govern Online Health Education
item.description: Health experts are urging the creation of regulatory frameworks to control online health education due to rising concerns about misinformation and unverified medical advice spreading across digital pl...

item.title: Senate Impeachment Court Emphasizes Mandatory Subpoena Compliance
item.description: The Senate impeachment court's spokesperson, Atty. Reginald Tongol, clarified that individuals subpoenaed during Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial are legally obligated to comply, with n...

item.title: Silica Nanoparticles Show Promise in Combating Aggressive Prostate Cancer
item.description: Researchers at Weill Cornell Medicine and Cornell Duffield College of Engineering developed ultrasmall fluorescent core shell silica nanoparticles (C' dots) that demonstrate significant potential in t...

item.title: TFF3 Protein Plays Key Role in Childhood Tumor Survival and Treatment Resistance
item.description: A recent study published in Liver International reveals that the protein TFF3 plays a critical role in the survival and progression of hepatoblastoma, a common malignant liver tumor in children. Resea...

item.title: Defense Secretary dismisses Chinese scholars' claim over Batanes sovereignty
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. dismissed as baseless the claim by Chinese scholars that the Philippines’ northernmost province of Batanes belongs to China through Taiwan, calling it a 'joke' a...

item.title: Senate showdown between Dan Kline and Graham Platner on key legislation
item.description: The article details a pivotal political confrontation between Senators Dan Kline and Graham Platner over critical legislative proposals. Kline, representing a conservative district, advocates for dere...

item.title: Caitlin Clark's Struggles Highlight Indiana Fever's Challenges in Loss to Shorthanded Sparks
item.description: Caitlin Clark's return to the Indiana Fever after a back injury was marked by a lackluster performance, as the team fell to the shorthanded Los Angeles Sparks 106-92. Despite her anticipated comeback,...

item.title: PM Modi and Albanese Discuss Diplomatic Ties and Strategic Agreements During India-Australia Summit
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese used cricket metaphors to describe their diplomatic relationship during a joint press statement in Melbourne. Modi compared ...

item.title: MTN and Telecel prepare to bid for Ghana's 5G licenses after government changes
item.description: MTN Group and Telecel Group are preparing to bid for 5G licenses in Ghana following the government's decision to revoke Next Gen Infraco's exclusive rights. The auction, expected within weeks, comes a...
